$comment: Reviewed deliberate deviations + baselined pre-existing drift between the hand-authored src/type|enum and the upstream GraphQL schema. The guard (npm run check:type-drift) FAILS on any divergence NOT listed here, so this is a debt ledger: it should SHRINK over releases as types are brought back in line. Reseed after a deliberate schema refresh with `node scripts/build-schema-drift-baseline.js` and review the git diff. Deprecated schema members are already excluded from the projection — an absent deprecated member is correct and never appears here.

exemptTypes.AnyAddress: SDK-only convenience union of the five address shapes; no schema counterpart. Hand-authored on purpose (see src/type/AnyAddress.ts).
